provenance_records.ip_confidence_justification: Explicit 'Star Wars' in title, 'Stormtrooper' character reference, CC-BY license allows reuse with attribution but does not grant IP rights to underlying Star Wars content.
provenance_records.source_authority_rationale: Sketchfab is a trusted platform. This specific creator (Oscar RP @oscarrep) has established presence with multiple published models.

license_assessment.license_text_summary: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International. Allows reuse with attribution but does not grant IP rights to underlying franchise.
license_assessment.attribution_requirement: Oscar RP must be credited in any usage
license_assessment.notes: CC-BY covers the 3D model work but NOT the Star Wars character design, which is owned by Lucasfilm/Disney

author_assessment.notes: Established Sketchfab creator with consistent community presence
